temporal_description: A low-angle, close-up shot focuses on the lower bodies of two men walking side-by-side at night. The ground is wet, reflecting the dim, greenish light from street lamps in the background. The men are dressed in dark suits and trousers. The man on the left carries a white, possibly leather, jacket in his left hand. The camera follows them as they walk forward. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio is dominated by the sound of two men walking on a wet surface, their footsteps echoing slightly in the quiet, nighttime atmosphere. The sound is crisp and clear, suggesting a hard, possibly paved, ground that is damp, creating a distinct, resonant thud with each step. The camera cuts to a wider, medium shot, revealing the two men standing beside a dark, vintage-style sedan in a wet, empty city street. The man on the left, who was previously on the right, now stands near the front of the car, looking towards the other man. The second man stands further back, looking down at the ground. The background is a dark cityscape with illuminated skyscrapers and streetlights casting long reflections on the wet pavement. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The shot is static, establishing the scene and the positions of the men and the car. There is no background music or dialogue, placing all the focus on the ambient sounds of the environment and the deliberate pace of the footsteps.
